description: Line-chart infographic on a white background titled in bold black text 'Federal Employment.' A single dark navy-blue line traces the size of the federal workforce month by month across the x-axis (labeled diagonally 'January 2025' through 'November 2025'), with a y-axis ranging from 2,750,000 up to 3,050,000. The line starts just above 3,000,000 in January and declines, then drops between September and October 2025 to about 2,750,000, where it flattens. The chart has light-gray horizontal gridlines and no logos or photos. The tweet text states that the federal workforce is decreasing while job growth goes to American-born workers.
